examples: He had pulled the blanket over his body to hide his nakedness.
So why did this nakedness evolve?
In that devastation, in the utter nakedness of spirit, let us become one in beauty.
But when people yawn at nakedness rather than smile, we will know that the novelty has worn off.
Philip Carr-Gomm's lushly illustrated book takes a long and enthusiastic look at the politics and culture of nakedness.
